folio.label: 115v
folio.l: But euäe lyue as a wydewe , in clothes blake
Shuxx as the Turtyl , that lost hatú hire make

note.notetxt: 835there is a cross in ink in the left margin, but the manuscript does not show any erasure, apparently only a blank space was left.ODR

folio.l: But at the last , after a monetú or twey
His sorwe gan to a swage , sotú to sey
For whan he wyst , it mygút noon other be
He paciently took , his aduersitee
Saue out of doute , he may nat forgou~
That he nas ielous , euäe more in on
Whicú ielousie , it was so outrageous
That neither in halle , ne in non oæä hous
Ne in non other place , neuäe the moo
He nolde suffre hire , for to ryde ne goo
But if he had hond , on hire alwey
For whicú ful ofte , wepetú fressú May
That louetú Damyan , so benygnely
That she mot either deyen , sodeynly
Or ellis she mot han hi~ , as hire list
She waytetú wha~ne , hire hert wold brest
¢ Vp on that other syde , Damyan
By comen is , the sorwefullest man
That euäe was , for neither nygút ne day

note.notetxt: 855there is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: Ne mygút he speke , a word , to fressú May
As to his purpos , of no swicú matere
But if that Ianuarie , must it heere
That had an hand , vp on hire , euäe moo
But natheles , be wrytyngö to and froo
And pryue signes , wyst he what she ment
And she knew eke , the fyn of his entent
¢ O Ianuarie , what mygút it the a vaille
Thougú æè mygút seen , as fer as shippes seylle
For as good is blynd , disceyued be
As ben disceyued , whan a man may se
Lo Argus , whicú that had , an hondred eyen
For al that euäe he coude , poure or pryen
ñet was he blynd , as god wot so ben moo
That wenen wysely , that it be nat so
Passe ouä , is an ease , I sey nomore
This fressú May , that I spak of bifore
In warme wex , hatú enprented the cliket
That Ianuarie bar , of the smal wyket
By whicú , in to his gardeyn , oft he went
And Damyan that knew , al hire entent
The cliket countrefetet , preuyly
There is nomore to seye , but preuylyhastilypreuylyhastily
Som wonder by this cliket , shal betide
